web.title: Arbor Coconut Grove
web.description: Nestled in the heart of the Village of Coconut Grove, Arbor is a lush, private sanctuary offering 45 spacious two-, three-, and four-bedroom residences.
web.markdown:
[0](https://www.arborresidences.com/cart)

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/67aed68cd3194851e6e344b5/cd88897d-b3ee-42f9-8dd6-33453f77a505/Night_Building.jpg)

# **Welcome Home**

### **A boutique 45-residence building in the heart of Coconut Grove. Around the corner from CocoWalk.**

#### **Move-in ready Q1 2026**

[Learn more](https://www.arborresidences.com/home#contact-us)

#### **Nestled in the heart of the Village of Coconut Grove, Arbor is a lush, private sanctuary offering 45 spacious two-, three-, and four-bedroom residences.**

#### **Each home is designed with versatility in mind, featuring a flexible den space that adapts to your lifestyle — whether it’s a playroom for young families, a home office for professionals, or a creative retreat for personal passions.**

#### **Blending timeless modern design with nature-inspired living, Arbor offers an intimate, low-density residential experience just steps from parks, marinas, cafés, and top schools.**

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/67aed68cd3194851e6e344b5/b65198c5-c3af-49db-acb7-97e3cf167fa8/Leaves+graphic.png)

## **Building Overview**

Created by Miami’s own Behar Font & Partners, Arbor’s exterior is inspired as much by the natural landscape as it is by the principles of modernist design. With only five floors, the building nestles discreetly among the leafy streets of Coconut Grove, offering a seamless connection between indoor comfort and outdoor serenity. Expansive floor-to-ceiling windows invite abundant natural light, creating bright, airy interiors that bring the beauty of the Grove inside.

[Learn more](https://www.arborresidences.com/home#contact-us)

![Lobby.jpg](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/67aed68cd3194851e6e344b5/1739527958277-UYEEXJWZO7DZBUGHQ80Y/Lobby.jpg)

![LivingRoom.jpg](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/67aed68cd3194851e6e344b5/1739527969428-QIPYX883YYU8VYB38RO3/LivingRoom.jpg)

![Bedroom.jpg](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/67aed68cd3194851e6e344b5/1739527981502-DYFSBR2SEZKID1WD3BQB/Bedroom.jpg)

![Kitchen.jpg](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/67aed68cd3194851e6e344b5/1739527991590-A3CWA6XEIB16SQ2LMWBM/Kitchen.jpg)

![Pool.jpg](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/67aed68cd3194851e6e344b5/1739528001141-JYWWXG1GD5UDDEDK70DM/Pool.jpg)

![Rooftop.jpg](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/67aed68cd3194851e6e344b5/1739528009468-2G5RQ5TZ5W9U1U3P81NZ/Rooftop.jpg)

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/67aed68cd3194851e6e344b5/15822352-5aef-4cea-984f-8bf24777f1e4/Arbor+Hero+Day+Rendering.jpg)

- 5-story eco-friendly building designed for low-density living

- 45 spacious residences with 2- to 4-bedroom layouts and flexible dens

- Floor-to-ceiling impact-resistant windows for natural light and open views

- Pet-friendly community with walkable access to parks and green spaces

- Electric car charging stations and ample resident parking

- Prime location—steps from shops, restaurants, marinas, and top-rated schools


[Learn more](https://www.arborresidences.com/contact)

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/67aed68cd3194851e6e344b5/b678d156-0f4a-466e-b540-79b43ae343b6/Arbor-Residences-Coconut-Grove-Next-to-Cocowalk-shopping-mall.png)

![20170418_LN_Arbor nort east rt2.jpg](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/67aed68cd3194851e6e344b5/3f5f934b-9c6d-4eb5-ac70-c19e62276424/20170418_LN_Arbor+nort+east+rt2.jpg?format=2500w)

Unable to load video. Try again later.

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/67aed68cd3194851e6e344b5/c0646300-4704-4057-8b03-f727e3aeccee/STG_1033-web.jpg)

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/67aed68cd3194851e6e344b5/3dc5e749-ffa8-4464-b16f-23f4f6692252/STG_5206-web.jpg)

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/67aed68cd3194851e6e344b5/b50b8eb8-dd5a-45a5-9e88-9f4a5b22c957/STG_0885-web.jpg)

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/67aed68cd3194851e6e344b5/3c30b043-6c48-40d7-8f38-633ebdc48175/STG_0355-web.jpg)

# **Our Vision**

Arbor is more than a residence — it’s a private sanctuary where modern design and nature exist in perfect harmony. Thoughtfully crafted to offer effortless living, this boutique collection of 45 spacious residences is inspired by the lush surroundings and timeless charm of Coconut Grove.

Here, life moves at a more natural pace—where mornings are filled with sunlight streaming through floor-to-ceiling windows, afternoons invite leisurely walks under tree-lined streets, and evenings bring effortless moments of connection with friends and family.

Embracing low-density living, sustainability, and wellness, Arbor is designed for those who appreciate open spaces, modern simplicity, and the beauty of everyday life.

**Welcome home—to a place where modern luxury feels natural, and nature feels like home.**

### Where Modern Living Meets Nature

[LEARN MORE](https://www.arborresidences.com/contact)

## **Arbor Residences in Coconut Grove**

Arbor Residences is a boutique, eco-friendly, 5-story condo building situated in the heart of Center [Coconut Grove](https://www.miamicondos.com/coconut-grove/), directly behind the famed CocoWalk and steps from an eclectic variety of shopping, entertainment and mouth-watering restaurants. Arbor consists of 52 condos offering a variety of 2 and 3-bedroom layouts including 2-story lofts, townhouses with 20-foot ceilings and penthouse residences with private terraces. Amenities at Arbor Coconut Grove include a courtyard swimming pool, fitness center, social lounge, rooftop terrace, concierge services and valet parking.

### **Arbor Residences Condo Features**

- 52 condo units offering 2 & 3-bedroom layouts
- 10’ ceilings
- Floor-to-ceiling windows
- Modern kitchens with stainless-steel appliances
- Private terraces in penthouse residences
- 2-story lofts and townhomes with 20-foot ceilings are available

### **Arbor Residences Features & Amenities**

- Courtyard swimming pool
- Fitness center
- Social lounge
- Rooftop terrace
- Concierge services
- Secured parking and storage
- 24-hour valet parking
